title: Carbon removal inventory
excerpt: Learn about available carbon removal inventory. *Products* (Products represent the different types of carbon removal units that are available for purchase) represent the carbon removal inventory available for purchase. All products come from *offtake agreements* (A contractual agreement to purchase carbon removal at a certain price if and when tons of carbon removal are delivered and verified) with carbon removal suppliers in [Frontier’s portfolio](https://frontierclimate.com/portfolio?track=offtake). Avoiding the worst impacts of climate change requires a portfolio of technologies.…
